title: TikTok Profile Scraper
description: Extract public TikTok profile data by username, profile URL, or numeric user ID.

unique_id.title: TikTok Username or Profile URL
unique_id.description: TikTok username with or without @, or a full profile URL like https://www.tiktok.com/@tiktok.

user_id.title: TikTok User ID
user_id.description: Numeric TikTok user ID. Use this instead of username when you already have the account ID.
